title: PACT Invite Response
description: Response body for POST /api/pact/{documentId}/invites — the created invite including the secret token (shown once).

token.description: The secret invite token. Shown once at creation — cannot be retrieved again.

trustLevel.description: Trust level assigned to agents joining with this token.

contextMode.description: Context mode for agents joining with this token.

allowedSections.description: Section IDs the agent can access (if context mode is section-scoped).

clearanceLevel.description: Classification clearance level granted on join.

usedCount.description: Number of times this token has been used.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. Null means no expiry.

revoked.description: Whether this invite has been revoked.
